name: Strawberry and Cream Blintzes
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the batter by combining eggs, salt, and water in a bowl. Gradually add cake meal while beating constantly to ensure no lumps form.
2. Pour about 3 tablespoons of batter onto a hot, lightly greased frying pan, rotating it to form a 6-inch circle.
3. Fry over moderate heat until the edges pull away from the pan. Turn out onto a clean cloth, cooked side up. Repeat with remaining batter.
4. Place a spoonful of filling in the center of each blintz. Fold in the edges and roll tightly. Repeat for all blintzes.
5. Fry the blintzes in small amounts of oil or butter until browned on all sides.
6. Serve with chilled strawberry sauce.
